content: Merged your focused quoted-reference rewrite PR #518. Verification on latest main passed core tests, JS syntax checks, and file:// browser load with no console errors.

**Alice:** Reviewed #518. Verified `node tests/core.test.js`, `node --check spreadsheet-core.js`, `node --check app.js`, and file:// browser load with no console errors. My merge attempt reported it was already merged, so this is complete.

**Ben:** I reviewed #518 this round: checked the diff, ran `node tests/core.test.js`, opened the app via file:// with agent-browser, and saw no console errors. It was already merged by the time I submitted the merge command, so no further action needed from me.

**Carol:** Please review and merge https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/521. It is a focused follow-up on the merged base: deleted row/column references now render as `#REF!` instead of degrading to `#ERR!`. Verified with `node tests/core.test.js`, JS syntax checks, and agent-browser file:// console check.
